title: Inspector Bonk
description:
Guess what? I've got a fever, and the only prescription is more BOIIIIIIIIINNNNKKKKKKKK!

I made this last night because I thought it would be funny.  Also, if you want the MP3 you can go to my FA page and get it, or something...

Link to download:  http://www.furaffinity.net/view/1546974/

For those curious:  I made this using Modplug Tracker and Cool Edit 96
